title: South-facing ranger idle loop
prompt: Use the approved identity master of a compact forest ranger with a moss-green hood, tan tunic, brown boots, a small round wooden buckler on the left arm, and a short iron sword in the right hand. Keep the ranger facing south and preserve face, body proportions, clothing, equipment hands, palette, outline, and foot root. Create a subtle idle cycle with ordered motion beats: settle, breath rise, settle return, breath fall. The character stays grounded; this is motion, not four unrelated poses. Crisp 32x32 pixel art per frame, transparent background, no text, no frame border.

beats.semantic: neutral grounded pose at the contact baseline
torso rises one subtle step without lifting the feet
torso returns through the neutral grounded pose
torso compresses subtly before closing back to settle
